race.description: Laurels Function Centre – Book Now Mdn Plate
race.comment: CRIME OF PASSION (9) has not raced since she finished third at Kilmore 17 months ago but has good ability having been tested at Group level early doors. Represents strong connections and can win off the long break. KOKO (12) raced on the speed from the outset when resuming last start and finished third, beaten 0.8 lengths, over 1000m at Seymour. Better for that and should take catching. CRYPT (3) hasn't raced since finishing fifth at Ballarat and has been gelded in the break. Market the best guide but respecting. TAN TAT ART (14) finished third last start at the first run back from a spell over 1200m at Ballarat, beaten 4.5 lengths. Drawn well and can improve. BOURDETO (8) showed some ability in two runs last time in and can pick up where she left off.
